content.content: I want to buy a MacBook, but it's too expensive. I remember using a large discount on a previous order. Could you compare that old discount with my current one? If the previous one was better, please refund that order and apply the refunded discount to this MacBook purchase to make it as cheap as possible.

<function_thought>
To execute the user's request, I will first view the order history to identify any orders that may have included a discount. After that, I will check the available discounts to compare the previous one with the current discount. If the previous discount is better, I will initiate the refund for that order and then proceed to add the MacBook to the cart. Finally, I'll attempt to checkout with the MacBook using the better discount if applicable. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history, view_available_discounts]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
